title: R — System Context Packet
description: Reality phase anchor. Stops the agent from coding without understanding the system.

repoKind.description: Repository type: vite-react-app, nextjs, node-cli, etc.

currentArchitectureGraphHash.description: SHA-256 hash of docs/system-map.graph.json at read time.

affectedNodes.description: Graph node IDs that this goal will touch.

filesInspected.description: File paths the agent inspected to understand current state.

existingPatternsToReuse.description: Patterns in the repo that should be extended, not reinvented.

antiPatternsToAvoid.description: Known failure modes and anti-patterns to avoid.

researchRequired.description: Whether the Research Governor must run before Acceptance.

researchReason.description: Why research is required (SDK change, agent scaffold, etc.).
